notice.displayName: This node must be connected to a vector store. Insert one

model.description: The model which will generate the embeddings. Learn more.

dimensions.description: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported in text-embedding-3 and later models.

baseURL.description: Override the default base URL for the API

batchSize.description: Maximum number of documents to send in each request

stripNewLines.description: Whether to strip new lines from the input text

timeout.description: Maximum amount of time a request is allowed to take in seconds. Set to -1 for no timeout.

encodingFormat.description: The format to return the embeddings in
